proposed_directions.title: Tension to Transformation
proposed_directions.angle: Open on the friction busy home cooks feel before Peppera — then let the product do the work visually. No explanation, just the before and after.
proposed_directions.why_it_works: Demonstrated transformation beats described features. The before/after arc is universally relatable across any category.
proposed_directions.visual_style: before/after sequence, Peppera in action, payoff frame with brand color #f04d23
hook_examples: This used to take so much longer.
I didn't know Peppera could do this until I tried.

proposed_directions.title: The Peppera Angle on easy dinner from whatever is in the fridge
proposed_directions.angle: Give busy home cooks a sharp, specific insight about easy dinner from whatever is in the fridge that only someone who built Peppera would know — then let the product be the natural answer.
proposed_directions.why_it_works: Insider knowledge signals authority without pitching. It earns trust, saves, and shares because it teaches something real.
proposed_directions.visual_style: clean editorial, helpful, witty, clean, proof or data moment, brand-consistent typography
hook_examples: Here is what most busy home cooks get wrong about easy dinner from whatever is in the fridge.
